name: B2B Activation Kit
description: Increase B2B sales and operational efficiency with a scalable wholesale ecommerce solution.
output: A fully configured Shopify B2B channel that enables account-based wholesale purchasing through customer-specific pricing, catalogs, and permissions—aligned with existing ecommerce operations and internal workflows.
outcome: Increase B2B sales and operational efficiency with a scalable wholesale ecommerce solution.

items.title: B2B Store Model Decisioning
items.body: A structured decision framework defining the optimal blended vs dedicated B2B store architecture based on operational and growth requirements.

items.title: Channel Architecture
items.body: Definition of how B2B customers, pricing, catalogs, and permissions to operate

items.title: Operations Model
items.body: Defined ownership and responsibilities for managing wholesale accounts, pricing, orders, fulfillment, and customer support in Shopify.

items.title: Company, Location + Account Structure
items.body: Setup of B2B companies, locations, user roles, and permissions.

items.title: Catalogs + Pricing Logic
items.body: Configuration of catalogs, customer-specific pricing, volume rules, and discount structures.

items.title: B2B Catalog Configuration
items.body: Product and collection setup to support bulk ordering, restricted visibility, and client-specific assortments.

items.title: Payments, Shipping + Terms Alignment
items.body: Configuration of B2B-appropriate payment methods, shipping rules, and checkout behavior.

items.title: Bulk Ordering + Reordering Workflows
items.body: Enablement of efficient purchasing and repeat order flows for wholesale buyers.

items.title: QA + Validation
items.body: Validation of pricing, access controls, catalogs, workflows, and integrations through end-to-end testing.

items.title: Enablement Toolkit
items.body: Documentation and guidance enabling internal teams to manage accounts, pricing, orders, and support workflows post-launch.

items.title: Launch Playbook
items.body: Launch sequencing, go-live validation.

name: Commerce AI Framework
description: Enable natural‑language search, ask, and buy with MCP‑enabled agentic assistants running on Shopify.
output: Structured data, optimized storefront, and agentic services to enable customer flows for wide AI adoption with a robust boilerplate for natural-language search, merchandising, and purchase.
outcome: Improved product discovery, NLP, search, and merch leading to higher conversion, and reduced friction through always-on, brand-safe AI + agentic experiences across your storefront.

items.title: Commerce Data Audit
items.body: Map products, collections, content, FAQs, and policies into a structured schema suitable for LLM and agentic use cases.

items.title: AI Integration Scaffold
items.body: Design how and where Shopify data and flow will operate storefront data for AI enabled interfaces/services, and operations.

items.title: Use Case + Intent Definition
items.body: Prioritize high-impact customer moments, agent assist, and merchandising scenarios (e.g., PDP assistance, guided find-the-right-product flows, upsell) with clear success metrics.

items.title: Journey + Flow Design
items.body: Design how natural language search, Q&A, and guided purchase journeys surface merchandise, trigger product discovery and cart actions, drive upsell, and hand off seamlessly into existing Shopify flows and services.

items.title: Persona + Tone Framework
items.body: Define boundaries, tone, and response/presentation frameworks for responses to feel on-brand, accurate, and helpful.

items.title: Dynamic Personalization
items.body: Design adaptive, context-aware modules that use AI to surface relevant insights, guide shoppers through discovery, and seamlessly connect into core commerce flows.

items.title: Agentic Implementation
items.body: Configure Shopify endpoints, tools, and agents to safely read and act on commerce data.

items.title: Internal Process Integration
items.body: Layer in and execute agentic services to offset internal process burden and flow.

items.title: Continuous Integration + Insights Reporting
items.body: Refine prompts, tools, and data coverage with a recurring report on performance, learnings, and next optimizations.

name: Creative Intelligence Studio
description: An AI-assisted studio for efficient creative and content production.
output: An AI-enabled creative system delivering validated creative directions, scalable asset libraries, and campaign-ready concepts—designed for ongoing content creation without full-scale production.
outcome: Enable your team to quickly validate creative directions, explore visual worlds at scale, and accelerate early-stage campaign development without the cost of full production.

items.title: Asset Audit
items.body: Assessment of existing creative assets, reference imagery, and mood directions to identify what resonates, what scales, and where AI-generated content is most effective.

items.title: Creative Direction Alignment
items.body: Definition of a focused set of approved creative directions, including visual themes, stylistic guardrails, and decision criteria.

items.title: Creative Recommendation Summary
items.body: Clear recommendation identifying the strongest creative paths, the most scalable asset types, and guidance for continued iteration or full production.

items.title: AI Still + Motion Asset Library
items.body: Ongoing generation of AI-driven stills and short-form motion clips aligned to approved creative directions and intended use cases.

items.title: Rough-Cut Motion Concepts
items.body: Assembly of AI-generated clips, stock elements, and placeholder copy into rough cut concepts that demonstrate campaign and ad applications.

items.title: Prompt + Workflow Templates
items.body: Reusable prompts and workflows enabling continued asset generation without restarting creative direction each month.

items.title: Directional Refinement Loop
items.body: Light refinement of creative directions based on output quality and usage signals—focused on improving the system, not individually polishing assets.

name: Customer Insights Toolkit
description: Higher engagement and conversion enabled by evidence‑based customer insights.

items.title: Participant Screener + Candidate Management
items.body: Diverse, high-value user research participants selected through a structured process.

items.title: Segmentation Framework + Testing Plan
items.body: User groups analyzed based on behavioral data.

items.title: Feedback Integration + Testing Optimization
items.body: Research objectives + methodology refined based on feedback.

items.title: User + Stakeholder Interview Execution
items.body: Gain insights on customer behaviors, needs, and pain points.

items.title: Real-Time Behavioral Data Mapping
items.body: Understand engagement trends and usability patterns.

items.title: Usability + Experience Optimization Guide
items.body: Playbook for refining site experience based on customer insights.

items.title: Audience Segmentation Report
items.body: Data-backed report outlining customer groups, behaviors, and opportunities.

items.title: Strategic Marketing + Product Action Plan
items.body: Apply insights across business functions.

name: Data Insights Engine
description: Enable faster, smarter decisions with actionable data analysis and insights.
output: A continuous analytics system that provides weekly and monthly performance reporting, growth-focused insights, KPI tracking, and on-demand deep-dive analysis across key data sources.
outcome: Smarter, faster decision-making that drives higher growth—powered by accurate reporting, clear KPI visibility, and continuous analysis aligned to business priorities.

items.title: KPI Framework + Baselines
items.body: Clear definition of the metrics that matter most, including baseline performance and targets tied to your growth initiatives.

items.title: Weekly Analytics Reporting
items.body: Concise weekly email updates summarizing key movements, trends, and insights across your primary platforms.

items.title: Monthly Performance Review
items.body: A deeper monthly meeting to assess results, understand drivers, and align next steps to business goals.

items.title: Multi Platform Data Analysis
items.body: Ongoing analysis from two key sources each month (e.g., GA, FB Ads), ensuring a holistic view of performance.

items.title: Priority Ad-Hoc Investigations
items.body: Rapid deep-dives into emerging questions or issues to support fast, informed decision-making.

items.title: Monthly Data Projects
items.body: Rotating deep dive analysis, report builds, or technical data support based on current business needs.

items.title: Insights + Recommendations
items.body: Actionable strategic recommendations tied directly to your growth initiatives—not just reporting, but direction.

name: Digital Strategy Toolkit
description: Create powerful, resonant customer experiences guided by experiential pillars that serve as your team’s north star.
output: A unified digital strategy blueprint that translates brand intent into clear experience principles, audience-informed priorities, and execution-ready guidance.
outcome: Create powerful, resonant customer experiences guided by experiential pillars that serve as your team’s north star.

items.title: Stakeholder Interview Analysis
items.body: Synthesize leadership and cross-functional perspectives into a clear set of shared priorities, risks, and decision drivers.

items.title: Digital Experience Audit
items.body: Evaluation of visual identity, messaging, and customer touch points to identify experience risks and opportunities that impact conversion, clarity, and brand expression.

items.title: Industry Benchmarking Analysis
items.body: Compare the current experience against relevant industry and category standards to identify competitive gaps, strengths, and priority opportunities.

items.title: Experience Principles Framework
items.body: Define a clear set of digital experience principles that power customer-centric brand strategy decisions and govern ongoing site initiatives across teams.

items.title: Digital Strategy Execution Guide
items.body: Translate brand pillars into digital concepts, priorities, and execution guidance that drive engagement, conversion, and consistent brand expression.

name: Ecommerce Roadmap Toolkit
description: A scalable planning framework and roadmap that drives clarity, alignment, and a path to hitting growth targets.
output: Roadmap document prioritizing features, setting milestones, and aligning cross-functional teams.
outcome: A scalable planning framework and roadmap that drives clarity, alignment, and a path to hitting growth targets.

items.title: KPI Alignment
items.body: Intake and analyze performance metrics, identify trends, and set clear objectives for the year ahead.

items.title: Unified Planning Calendar
items.body: Centralized view of product launches, marketing initiatives, and business milestones to provide a cross-team comprehensive view of priorities.

items.title: Key Initiative Development Workshop
items.body: Ideation and alignment for digital priorities across marketing, ecomm, technology, and customer experience. Create shared understanding through structured initiative development and scope calibration.

items.title: Initiative Prioritization Guide
items.body: Organize agreed upon initiatives into a structured, prioritized list ready for scheduling and execution.

items.title: Execution Blueprint + Workflow Setup
items.body: Convert the approved roadmap into a multi-sprint plan and structured workflow within Asana, so teams can execute with clarity and consistency.

name: Experimentation Engine
description: Accelerate revenue gains with continuous data-backed experimentation and UX optimizations across key pages.
output: Data-driven experimentation program to optimize key customer journeys and drive conversion performance through rapid testing and learning.
outcome: Accelerate wins with continuous experimentation and UX optimizations that compounds revenue gains over time.

items.title: User Behavior Analysis
items.body: Site analytics review, UX/UI friction point identification, and user feedback intake to inform optimization opportunities.

items.title: Competitive Benchmarking
items.body: Competitor site analysis to uncover potential opportunities to align to user expectation or to differentiate.

items.title: A/B Testing Roadmap
items.body: Structured testing plan leveraging the PXL framework to objectively prioritize and accelerate KPI-driving experiments.

items.title: Hypothesis Development
items.body: Data-backed hypotheses for conversion improvement and prioritize tests based on potential impact and effort.

items.title: Variant Design
items.body: Test variants designed for each planned experiment and associated goal.

items.title: Test Execution
items.body: Implementation and launch of agreed upon test variant(s).

items.title: Insights Feedback Loop
items.body: Test result analysis to identify winning variations and key learnings. Recommendations for immediate and future optimizations.

items.title: Winning Variant Rollout
items.body: Proven test results implemented into production using GitHub for clean version control and faster site performance.

items.title: Stakeholder Interview Analysis
items.body: Synthesize leadership and cross-functional perspectives into a clear set of shared priorities and challenges.

items.title: Competitive + Comparative Review

items.title: Annotated Figma Handoff

items.title: Design Execution

items.title: Performance Optimization
items.body: Speed, responsiveness, and stability improvements to support conversion and scale.

items.title: QA Testing + Usability Validation

items.title: CMS Guide + Team Enablement
items.body: Clear documentation and training for confident internal management.

items.title: Go to-Market Launch System

output: Fractional design support provided as an embedded resource within your marketing and ecommerce teams.

items.title: Multi-Channel Campaign Design
items.body: Design assets for email, paid media, social, and web that maintain a cohesive visual story across every consumer touchpoint.

items.title: Content + Asset Creation
items.body: Ongoing production of digital assets aligned with brand direction, marketing calendar, and promotional goals.

items.title: Brand Consistency + Systems Maintenance
items.body: Maintain and extend existing design systems, templates, and component libraries to ensure visual consistency and production efficiency.

items.title: Website Content Design
items.body: Design updates for homepage, landing pages, collection pages, and other on-site content to keep the storefront fresh and on-brand.

items.title: Creative Testing Support
items.body: Produce and iterate on asset variations across channels to support performance-driven creative testing.

items.title: Performance-Informed Iteration
items.body: Apply performance insights and feedback provided by the client's team to refine creative decisions without compromising brand integrity.

items.title: Cross-Functional Collaboration
items.body: Work alongside copy, marketing, and ecommerce teams to bring campaigns to life and ensure alignment across functions.

name: Fractional Ecommerce Support
description: Boost your content, merchandising, and ecomm operations support for moments of team transition.
output: Fractional ecommerce support provided as an in-house service embedded within your team.
outcome: Stabilize your content, merchandising, and ecomm operations  during moments of team transition.

items.title: Homepage Updates
items.body: Maintain a fresh homepage aligned with business calendar, brand storytelling, and promotional goals.

items.title: Collections, Products + Tagging updates
items.body: Ongoing support to organize products, update collections, and manage tagging so shoppers can easily find what they’re looking for.

items.title: Merchandising Updates
items.body: Re-merchandising including setup across collections, rules setup, pin selections and implemented product placement updates.

items.title: Landing Page Updates
items.body: Keep time sensitive or evergreen landing pages up to date with content refreshes.

items.title: Internal Communications

items.title: Cross-Functional Coordination
items.body: Support internal team members with intake and tasks prioritization based on urgency and business impact.

name: Global Activation Kit
description: Maximize global revenue potential with end‑to‑end international growth planning and implementation.
output: A fully configured international commerce channel using Shopify Markets that integrates localized pricing, currency, taxes, payments, and fulfillment into the existing ecommerce storefront for one new market.
outcome: Maximize global revenue potential with end-to-end international growth planning and implementation.

items.title: Market Activation Model
items.body: A clear framework defining how a new country or region operates within the existing storefront.

items.title: Pricing, Currency + Compliance Structure
items.body: Localized pricing rules, currency handling, and tax/duty automation configured to preserve margin and meet regional requirements.

items.title: Market Experience Configuration
items.body: UX design and implementation of market detection, selection, and routing within the existing theme to ensure correct localization.

items.title: Shopify Markets Setup
items.body: Activation of one international market, including domains, currencies, pricing rules, and regional settings.

items.title: Localized Payments + Checkout
items.body: Market-appropriate payment methods and checkout behavior enabled for local buyers.

items.title: Fulfillment + Logistics Alignment
items.body: Cross-border shipping, rates, and customs rules aligned to existing operations.

items.title: Language + Content Localization
items.body: Localized language and content enablement using Shopify native tools.

items.title: International QA & Validation
items.body: Validation of localized pricing, checkout, taxes, fulfillment, and end-to-end purchase flows within the live storefront.

items.title: Launch Playbook
items.body: Launch sequencing, go-live validation.

name: Growth Features Library
description: Deploy new features with minimal risk to power ongoing innovation and measurable business growth.
output: A production-ready Shopify feature deployed from a defined functional pattern, adapted to the brand and implemented using Shopify-first, scalable architecture.
outcome: Deploy new features with minimal risk to power ongoing innovation and measurable business growth.

items.title: Functional Pattern Selection
items.body: Feature selected by behavior and capability, mapped to business goals and customer experience needs.

items.title: Requirements Alignment Brief
items.body: A concise requirements document confirming scope, constraints, dependencies, and success criteria—ensuring alignment before activation.

items.title: VPV Feature Pattern Library
items.body: Access to a curated set of proven feature patterns with defined behaviors and use cases.

items.title: Tier Assignment Framework
items.body: Features not already in the library are classified into an existing tier to ensure predictable scope, pricing, and delivery.

items.title: Brand-Aligned UI Adaptation
items.body: UI styling adapted to match the brand while preserving standardized feature behavior.

items.title: Shopify-First, Ecosystem-Compatible Implementation
items.body: Feature implemented using Shopify-native capabilities and approved ecosystem tools, prioritizing scalability, maintainability, and long-term platform alignment.

items.title: Launch Validation + Enablement
items.body: End-to-end validation plus clear guidance enabling internal teams to manage and extend the feature post-launch.

name: Key Foundation Assessment
description: Unlock KPI gains by pinpointing friction and measuring your emotional, transactional, technical, and AI readiness.
output: Evaluate the emotional, transactional, technical, or AI readiness of your digital commerce foundation.
outcome: Each assessment culminates in a readiness score (A–F) and a clear action plan aligned to your next phase of growth.

items.title: Emotional Foundation Assessment (Brand)
items.body: Understand how your brand emotionally connects with your audience and identify where resonance gaps may limit long-term loyalty. Brand Resonance Report includes:

items.title: Brand Resonance Grade (A–F)
items.body: Brand Story + Narrative Audit Visual Identity + On-Site Expression Review Emotional Connection Score (based on brand consistency, storytelling, and tone)

items.title: Transactional Foundation Assessment (CX)
items.body: Optimize how users engage, navigate, and convert across touchpoints. Experience Flow Report includes:

items.title: Transactional Fluency Grade (A–F)
items.body: UX/UI and Path-to-Purchase Analysis Checkout + Mobile Experience Review Accessibility + Friction Audit Recommendations to streamline conversion and boost performance metrics

items.title: Code Review Report
items.body: Prepare your platform to scale with a readiness score across architecture, integrations, performance, and stability. Code Review Report includes:

items.title: Technical Readiness Grade (A–F)
items.body: Codebase Architecture + Framework Review Third-Party Integration + API Audit Site Speed + Performance Overview Key Risks + Recommendations + Action Plan

items.title: AI-Readiness Assessment (Agentic Commerce)
items.body: Gauge your readiness to adopt Shopify s AI ecosystem and agentic commerce tools. AI Integration Roadmap includes:

items.title: AI Readiness Grade (A–F)
items.body: Data Infrastructure + Schema Audit Personalization + Recommendation Engine Review Agentic Workflow + Automation Opportunities Roadmap for integrating Shopify + ChatGPT or partner-based AI systems into your ecosystem

name: Landing Page System
description: High‑converting, scalable landing page system for ongoing landing page creation.
output: A Shopify-native landing page system with defined architecture and modular layouts that enables fast, repeatable creation of high-performing pages.
outcome: High-converting, scalable landing page system for ongoing landing page creation.

items.title: Landing Page Architecture Review
items.body: Assessment of existing landing pages, campaign usage, and content patterns to identify gaps, inconsistencies, and scalability constraints across marketing and ecommerce initiatives.

items.title: Strategic Landing Page Framework
items.body: Definition of a repeatable landing page architecture, including core page types, strategic content hierarchy, and conversion logic designed to support current and future campaign needs.

items.title: Priority Landing Page Types
items.body: Definition of the core landing page use cases the system is designed to support (e.g. paid media, launches, promotions, evergreen campaigns).

items.title: Conversion-Optimized UX Patterns
items.body: Standardized UX patterns for CTAs, product highlights, trust signals, and supporting content grounded in proven ecommerce conversion best practices.

items.title: Modular Layout + Section System
items.body: Design of a flexible, brand-ready system of reusable page sections and layouts that can be recombined to support multiple use cases without redesign.

items.title: Reusable UI Components
items.body: Standardized, implemented UI components optimized for consistency, performance, and repeat use across landing pages.

items.title: Shopify Theme Compatibility Model
items.body: Clear definition of how landing pages are built, edited, and managed within Shopify’s theme architecture and approved page-building tools.

items.title: Team Enablement Guide
items.body: Documentation outlining how teams create, configure, and maintain landing pages using the established system—ensuring long-term usability and scalability.

name: Loyalty Experience System
description: Strengthen loyalty by surfacing your program to drive more opt‑ins and repeat participation.

items.title: Current Loyalty Experience Audit
items.body: Review how and where the program appears today across key templates.

items.title: Competitive + Comparative Analysis
items.body: Analyze loyalty placement, messaging, and UX patterns from direct competitors and best-in-class brands to identify gaps and opportunities.

items.title: Touchpoint Mapping
items.body: Identify priority moments to introduce or reinforce loyalty—such as sign-up prompts, points balance visibility, earn/redeem prompts, and post-purchase placement.

items.title: Messaging Refinement
items.body: Clarify the loyalty value proposition with updated labels, CTAs, and descriptive microcopy that makes the program easy to understand at a glance.

items.title: On-Site Module and Component Enhancements
items.body: Enhance or configure loyalty banners, badges, pop-ups, in-line modules, and account components within the existing theme to better surface program benefits.

items.title: Technical Alignment + QA
items.body: Ensure loyalty platform settings, theme components, and analytics tracking remain consistent and functional across updated touchpoints.

name: Multi‑Brand Activation Kit
description: Enable independent brand management while boosting back‑end efficiency and accelerating expansion.
output: An operational framework and Shopify configuration that enables multiple brand storefronts to launch and scale on a shared theme foundation, with clear governance, repeatable processes, and centralized efficiency.

items.title: Masterbrand Architecture Framework
items.body: A clear structure defining brand hierarchy, shared components, and allowable variation across storefronts.

items.title: Cross-Brand Governance Model
items.body: Defined rules for theme updates, feature rollout, and change control across all brand sites.

items.title: Shared Theme Operating Model
items.body: A documented approach for maintaining and deploying a single theme across multiple Shopify stores.

items.title: Multi Site Infrastructure Assessment
items.body: Evaluation of existing stores, integrations, and workflows to identify consolidation and scale opportunities.

items.title: Brand Configuration Standards
items.body: Clear standards for brand specific configuration (content, styling variables, settings) without forking the theme.

items.title: Multi-Storefront Shopify Configuration
items.body: Shopify instances configured to operate independently while adhering to shared systems and standards.

items.title: Centralized Tech Stack Alignment
items.body: Analytics, integrations, and automation aligned across brands for consistency and efficiency.

items.title: Site Expansion Playbook
items.body: A standardized process for launching additional brand sites using the shared theme and governance model.

items.title: Current State Workflow Mapping
items.body: Assessment of product setup, inventory sync, fulfillment logic, and promotional workflows to identify friction, duplication, and inefficiencies.

items.title: Gap + Bottleneck Identification

items.title: Automation Prioritization Framework
items.body: Defined recommendations for which workflows should be automated first based on impact, effort, and scalability.

items.title: Stakeholder Interview Analysis

items.title: Global styling extended across additional theme modules.
Scalable Design System

items.title: Audit Current Product Data Setup
items.body: Uncover gaps and inconsistencies in your product data that limit search, filtering, and merchandising performance.

name: Promo Operating System

items.title: Promotion Architecture Review

name: Returns Reduction System

items.body: Documentation of identified return drivers, implemented experience fixes, and recommended standards to help teams maintain product clarity and reduce returns over time.
